role_title: Emerging Growth Account Manager Future Opportunities

level_signals: OTE $120,000 - $140,000 CAD, consistent with junior-to-mid AE level
Emerging Growth Segment framing implies high-volume, entry-level accounts

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Execute on pipeline and bookings growth strategies
Track & report on critical sales and account metrics
Act as a trusted business advisor to C-level business audiences as you use your in-depth knowledge of Boomi technology, products, and services to help customers formulate strategy and direction
Utilize strategic probing to identify, evaluate, design, and propose business solutions

scope.surface: Emerging Growth Segment — high-volume, high-velocity new customer acquisition
core_responsibilities: Acquire new customers in the Emerging Growth Segment
Act as trusted business advisor to C-level audiences
Utilize strategic probing to identify and propose business solutions
Analyze market factors to identify customer problems and recommend solutions
Engage cross-functional resources to achieve goals and meet customer needs
Develop and implement account plans targeting critical business objectives
Execute on pipeline and bookings growth strategies
Track and report on critical sales and account metrics

compensation.notes: OTE ranges from $120,000 - $140,000 CAD annually; USD equivalent not stated

green_flags: OTE compensation range explicitly disclosed ($120,000–$140,000 CAD)
Hybrid schedule clearly defined (Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday in-office)
Encourages candidates with impostor syndrome / confidence gap to still apply
Role has a clear and specific segment focus (Emerging Growth / high-volume, high-velocity)
red_flags: Role title says 'Future Opportunities' — may be a pipeline/evergreen posting rather than an immediate opening
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD
Compensation stated in CAD only; no USD equivalent — limits clarity for cross-border candidates
No explicit mention of quota, territory, or team structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and OTE range)
scope.business_model (inferred from Boomi product description as B2B SaaS integration platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly named in JD)
compensation.base_range_usd (null; only CAD OTE stated, no base/variable split disclosed)
ambiguities: Role title includes 'Future Opportunities' which may indicate this is a pipeline/evergreen requisition rather than an active immediate hire — not clarified in the body.
OTE of $120,000–$140,000 CAD is total on-target earnings; base vs. variable split is not disclosed.
